recommendations.title: The Innkeepers
recommendations.overview: During the final days at the Yankee Pedlar Inn, two employees determined to reveal the hotel's haunted past begin to experience disturbing events as old guests check in for a stay.

recommendations.title: The Fury of a Patient Man
recommendations.overview: Quiet Jose woos cafe worker Ana, but she is unaware he has intentions other than the purely romantic.

recommendations.title: Pretty Lethal
recommendations.overview: A troupe of ballerinas find themselves fighting for survival as they attempt to escape from a remote inn after their bus breaks down on the way to a dance competition.

recommendations.title: Superhost
recommendations.overview: Two travel vloggers check into a vacation rental with a host that will do anything for a good review.

recommendations.title: River
recommendations.overview: The one-hundred-year-old Fujiya inn stands in the quiet region of Kyoto. Mikoto is standing in front of the Kibune river at the back of the building when she is called back to work. But two minutes later, she finds herself back at the river again. Th

recommendations.title: Jamaica Inn
recommendations.overview: In early 19th-century Cornwall, young Mary Yellan travels to live with her aunt and uncle at the remote Jamaica Inn, where she discovers the inn is a front for a violent gang of wreckers who lure ships to their doom along the coast. As she becomes en

recommendations.title: Flying Swords of Dragon Gate
recommendations.overview: Three years after the infamous Dragon Inn was burnt down in the desert when its innkeeper Jade vanished. A new gang of marauders had taken over - innkeepers by day and treasure hunters by night. The inn is the rumoured location of a lost city buried

recommendations.title: Obsession
recommendations.overview: Gino, a drifter, begins an affair with inn-owner Giovanna as they plan to get rid of her older husband.

recommendations.title: Frontier(s)
recommendations.overview: A gang of young thieves flee Paris during the violent aftermath of a political election, only to hole up at an Inn run by neo-Nazis.

recommendations.title: Malicious
recommendations.overview: A young college professor and his pregnant wife unwittingly release a malevolent entity with murderous intentions.
